name: Democrats.org
subject: TODAY: Trump to kick off re-election campaign
body:
Let's show Trump we're ready to beat him **Donald Trump is holding the first rally of his re-election campaign today. Pitch in $10 or whatever you can to help make sure Trump is a one-term president.

** **[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c512/4067b0a/2caf501ca/7e7d63eb/2612115286/VEsH/ "http://my.democrats.org/One-Term-Trump-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20170218_dnc_rem&source=em_20170218_dnc_rem&refcode=em_20170218_dnc_rem")**

name: Donna Brazile
subject: I want to hear from you!
body:
If you're one of the thousands who have made their voices heard
---
**We want to hear about your experience contacting your members of Congress or attending your local town hall meeting.

** **[TELL YOUR STORY](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Hear-Your-Voice1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+TELL+YOUR+STORY&utm_campaign=em_20170218_db_nd&source=em_20170218_db_nd")**
Friend --

Elected representatives serve all of their constituents, not just their base. And the way that Republicans have been treating their own constituents lately is downright disgraceful.

Over the past few weeks, we've seen something amazing in this country. We've seen people in all 50 states and in Washington, D.C. taking to the streets, picking up their phones, and otherwise raising hell to make sure Donald Trump and Republicans in Congress know we're not going away and they're going to be held accountable.

And then you have Kellyanne Conway shrug all that off -- saying she's more worried about her own "Real Person Impact" meter than the concerns of the thousands of people jamming the Capitol's phone lines to express their concern. Because apparently those concerned citizens aren't "real people."

Or hear Rep. Jason Chaffetz suggest that the massive crowds that showed up to his town hall last week were paid protestors -- rather than his own Utah constituents who want their voices to be heard.

These folks work for you. And if they're not listening, they're not doing their jobs. So if you're one of the millions of Americans who has reached out to your representatives, whether it was making a call to their office or showing up at a town hall event, I want to hear your story. **Because I want to make one thing perfectly clear to Republicans -- these are real people. And these real people are going to help vote them out of office:**

**[TELL YOUR STORY](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Hear-Your-Voice1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+TELL+YOUR+STORY&utm_campaign=em_20170218_db_nd&source=em_20170218_db_nd")**
Thanks for speaking out. You're making a real difference, and I'm so proud to have you on this team.

Donna

Donna Brazile
Chair
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c52e/4067b0a/2ca5af890/7e7d623d/2417311946/VEsF/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170218_db_nd&source=em_20170218_db_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c52e/4067b0a/2ca5af890/7e7d623a/2417311946/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170218_db_nd&source=em_20170218_db_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c52e/4067b0a/2ca5af890/7e7d623b/2417311946/VEsD/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170218_db_nd&source=em_20170218_db_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c52e/4067b0a/2ca5af890/7e7d6238/2417311946/VEsA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170218_db_nd&source=em_20170218_db_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.
